tagline: The AI-native CRM for modern sales teams

add_ons.name: Extra AI Credits
add_ons.description: Boost your monthly AI credit limit

add_ons.name: Additional Users (Starter)
add_ons.description: Add up to 10 more users to Starter plan

add_ons.name: White-label
add_ons.description: Remove NexusAI branding; available on Growth and Enterprise

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes — all plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

faqs.question: Can I switch plans?
faqs.answer: You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades are prorated immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or startups?
faqs.answer: Yes — 30% discount for verified nonprofits, and 20% for seed-stage startups. Contact sales@nexusai.io.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Enterprise plan includes HIPAA & SOC2 Type II compliance.

faqs.question: What counts as an AI credit?
faqs.answer: One AI credit = one AI-assisted action (e.g., email draft, lead score, summary). Viewing dashboards and manual CRM entries don't consume credits.
